content: I have only recently begun developing in the kernel and have been manually compiling busybox and building my own initramfs. Do you have any automated tools to do that and add some rust modules? because always rebuilding manually seems like a chore...

y86 said:

I have only recently begun developing in the kernel and have been manually compiling busybox and building my own initramfs. Do you have any automated tools to do that and add some rust modules? because always rebuilding manually seems like a chore...

Maybe check with the scripts in .github/workflows?
Thanks for letting me know, havent seen those!
